title: Supply Chain Manager - Aramex India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Aramex India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!
